zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Baker於大約1410年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，他的父親Thomas Baker III27歲，母親Margaret Thomas23歲。他於大約1454年與Benet Middlelton在英國肯特可藍別盧可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1497年在他的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在英國肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Baker于大约1410年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，他的父亲Thomas Baker III27岁，母亲Margaret Thomas23岁。他于大约1454年与Benet Middlelton在英国肯特可藍別盧可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1497年在他的家乡享年89岁，埋葬在英国肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Baker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from Middle English bakere, Old English bæcere, a derivative of bacan ‘to bake’. It may have been used for someone whose special task in the kitchen of a great house or castle was the baking of bread, but since most humbler households did their own baking in the Middle Ages, it may also have referred to the owner of a communal oven used by the whole village. The right to be in charge of this and exact money or loaves in return for its use was in many parts of the country a hereditary feudal privilege. Compare Miller . Less often the surname may have been acquired by someone noted for baking particularly fine bread or by a baker of pottery or bricks.

Americanized form (translation into English) of surnames meaning ‘baker’, for example Dutch Bakker , German Becker and Beck , French Boulanger and Bélanger (see Belanger ), Czech Pekař, Slovak Pekár, and Croatian Pekar .

History: Baker was established as an early immigrant surname in Puritan New England. Among others, two men called Remember Baker (father and son) lived at Woodbury, CT, in the early 17th century, and an Alexander Baker arrived in Boston, MA, in 1635.

variants.name: Miller
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Baxter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English baxter ‘baker’ (from Old English bæcestre ‘baker’, earlier ‘female baker’, the feminine equivalent of bæcere). Compare Baker .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Baker was born about 1410, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Baker III, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Thomas, was 23. He married Benet Middlelton about 1454, in Cranbrook, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Baker est né environ 1410, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Baker III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Thomas, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Benet Middlelton environ 1454, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Baker um 1410 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Baker III 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Thomas 23. Er hat um 1454 in Cranbrook, Kent, England Benet Middlelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1497 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cranbrook, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Baker è nato il circa 1410 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas Baker III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Thomas, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Benet Middlelton circa 1454, nel Cranbrook, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Cranbrook, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bakerが約1410年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Baker IIIは27歳，母Margaret Thomasは23歳であった。約1454年にイギリスケントクランブルークでBenet Middleltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1497年に故郷で89歳で死去し，イギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Baker(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Baker III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Thomas(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1454년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Benet Middlelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1497년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Baker nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Baker III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Thomas, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Benet Middlelton aproximadamente 1454, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Baker родился около 1410 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Baker III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Thomas, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Benet Middlelton около 1454 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия.
